project: a daily generative art practice, after Zach Lieberman
batch_note: Batch 001 — seven candidates in seven directions, awaiting curation.

sketches.title: pool
sketches.note: Soft color-field blobs breathing into each other, pigment-style mixing on cream paper.

sketches.title: hills
sketches.note: Rolling noise terrain through an 8×8 Bayer matrix. One bit of ink; the machine pretends to be a printer.

sketches.title: misregistration
sketches.note: Two riso ink layers of warped stripes printed slightly off-register. The moiré is the drawing.

sketches.title: lenses
sketches.note: A quiet grid of dots disturbed by invisible glass. Three lenses wander the field.

sketches.title: plume
sketches.note: Particles ride a slowly turning noise field, drawing additive light. Long exposure of something that was never there.

sketches.title: wash
sketches.note: Translucent deformed circles settle on paper one at a time, like watercolor drying in layers.

sketches.title: taffy
sketches.note: Video feedback in software: the canvas redraws into itself, rotated and zoomed, while three lights orbit.
